---
title: "小鼠血糖拉丁方设计"
author: "林佳欣10225000462"
date: "2024-11-29"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
data <- read.table('mouse.txt',header = TRUE)
str(data)
data$鼠号 <- factor(data$鼠号)
data$次数 <- factor(data$次数)
data$拉丁方 <- factor(data$拉丁方)
data$处理 <- factor(data$处理)
data.aov = aov(data$血糖值 ~ data$处理 + data$次数 + data$拉丁方, data)
summary(data.aov)
data.aov = aov(data$血糖值 ~ data$处理 + data$次数 + data$鼠号, data)
summary(data.aov)
data.aov.res = residuals(data.aov)
data.aov.fitted = fitted.values(data.aov)
# 残差的正态概率图
source("PP_plot.R")
pp.plot(x = data.aov.res, pch = 0, xlab = "Residual",
line.method = "Q", legend.add = FALSE)
# 残差与拟合值的关系图
plot(data.aov.fitted, data.aov.res,
xlab = "Fitted", ylab = "Residuals", pch = 0)
abline(h = 0)
# 残差与处理的关系图
plot(as.numeric(data$处理), data.aov.res,
xlab = "处理", ylab = "Residuals", pch = 0)
abline(h = 0)
```
